rows.description: L. Tew old Copyholds, now. Lease-holds, not Corn. Rents -
rows.notes: Description is a synthesis based on visual verification. 'L. Tew' was chosen over `gpt-5-mini`'s 'L. Ten'. Visual inspection confirmed a period after 'now' and 'Lease-holds' as a single hyphenated word. The trailing dash after 'Rents' from `gemini-flash` was also visually confirmed. `gpt-5-mini`'s notes were useful for highlighting general ambiguity in abbreviations for this header line, but `gemini-flash`'s overall transcription was closer to the visual truth.
